summary: Excellent high‑quality audience recording captures a fire‑brand performance where the band was on fire.
review: The review praises both the musical performance and the audio fidelity. Reviewers note that the AUD source sounds as clear as a soundboard, with every instrument defined and the Jerry‑Phil interplay front‑and‑center, while also calling the show one of the best of its era.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review lauds both the show and recording, indicating an exceptional performance captured with excellent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great‑quality AUD tape; instruments are clearly defined, crisp soundstage, feels like sitting at the front of the soundboard.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy set praised as one of the era’s best, with seamless interplay and a fire‑brand performance throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Interaction with Phil highlighted; guitar tone clear and prominent.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass work noted for its clarity and interaction with Jerry.
